title: Happy Boy :)
description: This horror mod adds a lot of new strange entities and biomes that will be extremely aggressive towards you! I hope you will love this mod!
body: This horror mod adds a lot of new strange entities and biomes that will be extremely aggressive towards you! I hope you will life this mod!The balance has also been revised, and new crafts have been added for items that did not have them in the original, such as the Portal Frame to End or the Enchanted Apple
